author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Review pass complete. Fixed: (1) include_str paths off by one level in merge.rs and mod.rs, (2) orphaned doc comments from removed sections, (3) duplicate constants — merge.rs now imports MCP_JSON/SETTINGS_JSON/PYTHON_PREFIX_PLACEHOLDER from parent, mod.rs imports GITIGNORE markers from merge, (4) internal functions in python.rs unnecessarily pub(super). Final structure: mod.rs 1693, walkthrough.rs 699, merge.rs 231, python.rs 186, signing.rs 88. Binary builds clean, all 1665 tests pass.
